name: micky-psych-research-kit
description: Standalone two-plugin kit from micky-psych-tools: decision-driven PubMed evidence reports plus a print-ready clinical infographic renderer.

plugins.name: pubmed-research-note
plugins.description: Answers a clinical decision from primary literature. Verdict-first, quantified, trial-registry-checked evidence reports whose shape follows the decision, not the topic. Locks the decision before searching (via the intent-lock plugin when installed, otherwise with a short built-in interview), then renders the report inline; files it to a vault only when the vault-keeper plugin is installed.

plugins.name: clinical-infographic
plugins.description: Renders a sourced clinical evidence report into a professional, print-ready medical summary infographic for clinical reference — a single self-contained HTML file with color-coded phase/theme columns, stat tiles, and a mandatory contraindications/"medications to avoid" safety banner. Ships no search engines by design: it never invents a clinical fact. Deep-integrates with pubmed-research-note (reuse an existing report or generate one first); vault filing only when the vault-keeper plugin is installed.
